infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: nomadspeople uses your location to show where you are on the map when you go live.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: nomadspeople needs access to your photos so you can choose a profile picture or share images in group chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: nomadspeople may save images you share from the app.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: nomadspeople uses anonymous usage stats to improve the app. Your chats, profile, and location are NEVER tracked across other apps.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: nomadspeople uses your location to show where you are on the map when you go live.

auth.// appleEnabled / googleEnabled: Feature flags that gate the Apple / Google sign-in buttons in AuthScreen. Flip to true AFTER the Apple Developer + Google Cloud + Supabase Provider configuration is complete (see docs/2026-04-22-apple-google-signin.md). Until then the buttons stay hidden so we don't ship a non-working CTA.
auth.// googleWebClientId: OAuth 2.0 Web Client ID from Google Cloud Console. Used by Android for server-side token verification; also passed to GoogleSignin.configure on iOS so the ID token is audience-matched to what Supabase expects. Fill in once we have it — string format ending in '.apps.googleusercontent.com'.
auth.// googleIosClientId: OAuth 2.0 iOS Client ID from Google Cloud Console. This is what GoogleSignin uses natively on iOS; Android reads its value from google-services.json and does not need this field.
